nasb.text: “Then Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting and take off the linen garments which he put on when he went into the holy place, and shall leave them there.

esv.text: “Then Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting and shall take off the linen garments that he put on when he went into the Holy Place and shall leave them there.

cnv.text: “亞倫要進會幕，把他進聖所時所穿的細麻布衣服脫下，放在那裡。

ccb.text: “亚伦要走进会幕，脱下他进至圣所时穿的细麻衣服，放在会幕里。
